name: STO SE & Co. KGaA Inhaber-Vorzu
summary: STO SE & Co. KGaA Inhaber-Vorzu is a German manufacturer of products and systems for building coatings, including facade insulation systems, paints, and plasters. The company operates as a Kommanditgesellschaft auf Aktien (KGaA), a legal form similar to a limited partnership with shares, headquartered in Stühlingen, Germany. "Inhaber-Vorzu" indicates bearer preference shares.
